rationale: Stage 1 cleanly delivers the sealed `ResolvedConfig` foundation per SD-024 / TD-024. Sentinel-based seal with panic message naming `LoadAndResolve`, exactly 22 accessors each guarded by `requireSealed`, defensive map cloning for the two map accessors, and a comprehensive per-accessor zero-value panic test. Scope is correctly limited to the type + tests with no production caller wiring.
